case_title: LEI, MARIA I. VS HUBBARD, THELMA BRACEY

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-20-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-19-1999 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $201.21 FILED BY LEI, MARIA I. AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, THELMA BRACEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, MARIA I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUBBARD, THELMA BRACEY $201.21 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $221.21, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, THELMA BRACEY
